overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking along a tropical beach shoreline and ascending to a resort pool deck. The scene transitions from sandy beach to a paved pool area with palm trees, lounge chairs, and a curved swimming pool under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline next to resort hotel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sand at the water's edge, moving parallel to the resort building toward a stone staircase

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water meeting the shoreline
wet sandy beach where waves have receded
multi-story curved hotel building with glass windows and stone base
textured stone wall separating the beach from the hotel property
tall palm trees visible in the distance near the hotel entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit tropical beach with calm ocean waters on the left and a large curved resort hotel on the right. The wet sand reflects the bright sunlight as the character moves steadily toward a stone staircase leading up to the hotel's pool deck area.

events.description: character turns right and begins ascending the stone staircase from beach level
character reaches the top of the stairs and steps onto the paved pool deck

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs with metal handrail, transitioning from beach level to the elevated pool deck

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with textured treads leading upward
black metal handrail along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase flanked by textured walls, moving from the open beach into a more enclosed vertical space. The metal handrail guides the climb as the beach and ocean fall out of view behind, transitioning to the upper pool deck level.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved resort pool deck with lounge seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved pool deck, passing rows of white lounge chairs and palm trees while following the curve of the swimming pool

entered.detail: large curved turquoise swimming pool with clear water
tropical palm trees with green fronds lining the pool edge
rows of white cushioned lounge chairs arranged on the deck
red shade umbrellas visible further along the deck near the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elegant paved pool deck with a turquoise swimming pool curving along the left side and the hotel building on the right. Palm trees and rows of empty lounge chairs line the path as the character continues along the resort's elevated waterfront area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, sunlit tropical shoreline to an elevated, luxurious resort pool deck. It begins with the character walking along wet, reflective sand between the calm ocean waters and a large curved hotel. As the character reaches the hotel's edge, the scene shifts from the open beach to a more enclosed vertical space while ascending a stone staircase flanked by textured walls. The camera then emerges onto an elegant paved deck, where the beach falls away to reveal a turquoise swimming pool curving along the left. Finally, the view expands across the elevated waterfront area, passing rows of empty lounge chairs and palm trees beneath the bright midday sun.
